originalDescription: Set up Umami analytics for privacy-friendly traffic tracking in apps/admin (Next.js). Create an Analytics component that conditionally loads the Umami script using environment variables NEXT_PUBLIC_UMAMI_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_UMAMI_WEBSITE_ID. Add the component to the root layout. Document the env vars in .env.local.example. Register the website at umami.proto-labs.ai.
sanitizedDescription: Set up Umami analytics for privacy-friendly traffic tracking in apps/admin (Next.js). Create an Analytics component that conditionally loads the Umami script using environment variables NEXT_PUBLIC_UMAMI_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_UMAMI_WEBSITE_ID. Add the component to the root layout. Document the env vars in .env.local.example. Register the website at umami.proto-labs.ai.
